titles.text: The 12th Annual Vanilla Level Design Contest: Collaboration Hack

descriptions.text: This is the collaboration hack of SMWCentral’s 12th Vanilla Level Design Contest from 2020. We started working on this hack right after the VLDC11 compilation got finished. 8 months of work that paid off in the end. This hack has 127 entries and 4 switch palaces, with 131 exits in total.
